latestChanges: Angular ecosystem released notable updates in the last 12 months.
Tooling around Angular improved DX and performance.
Learning resources for Angular now emphasize real-world architecture patterns.
angular.problemItSolves: Angular helps teams deliver maintainable solutions for its core domain with predictable conventions and strong ecosystem support.
historyNotes: Angular started with focused goals and later broadened into a full ecosystem.
Community adoption accelerated once tooling stabilized.
Modern usage favors patterns that improve long-term maintainability.

practiceChallenges.title: Basics
practiceChallenges.prompt: Build a tiny Angular hello-world and explain each part.

practiceChallenges.title: Core patterns
practiceChallenges.prompt: Implement one core Angular pattern and justify your choices.

practiceChallenges.title: Architecture
practiceChallenges.prompt: Design a maintainable Angular module split for a medium feature.

practiceChallenges.title: Performance
practiceChallenges.prompt: Profile and optimize one measurable bottleneck in a Angular workflow.

practiceChallenges.title: Production readiness
practiceChallenges.prompt: Create a production checklist for Angular and validate it against a sample project.

antiCheatRules: Focus switches are tracked and reduce confidence in the score.
Assessment is time-boxed and should be completed in one attempt.
Avoid copy/paste and external assistants while answering.

multipleChoice.question: Which statement best captures Angular's primary value?
options: It provides structured solutions for a specific problem space
It removes the need for testing
multipleChoice.explanation: Strong technologies usually win by narrowing complexity in a clear domain.

multipleChoice.question: What is the best next step after learning Angular fundamentals?
options: Skip projects and only read docs
multipleChoice.explanation: Application through projects cements concepts and exposes trade-offs.

multipleChoice.question: Which practice best supports mobile-first learning UX?
options: Small interactive tasks with immediate feedback
multipleChoice.explanation: Short, interactive loops are more usable on mobile devices.

codeDropdown.instructions: Fill all blanks to complete this Angular pseudocode flow.

mobileUxNotes: Prioritize large touch targets and short prompts.
Prefer dropdown code blanks over free-form typing on mobile.
Keep each assessment step under ~60 seconds.
